name: nexabit-networking
description: Open-source network utilities platform by Nexabit IT Solutions
author: Nexabit IT Solutions <info@nexabitit.com>

scripts.build:vercel: pnpm --filter @nexabit/shared build && pnpm --filter @nexabit/validators build && pnpm --filter @nexabit/crypto build && pnpm --filter @nexabit/networking build && pnpm --filter @nexabit/api-core build && pnpm --filter @nexabit/db build && pnpm --filter @nexabit/web build
